name: Orange Spirited Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 1 1/2-quart. heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish, place the slivered carrots and vodka. Sprinkle sugar and grated orange peel over the carrots. Dot with 1/4 cup butter or margarine.
2. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 10 to 12 minutes, stirring occasionally, until carrots reach desired degree of tenderness.
